The Russian Federation is slowly but advancing. Their losses are record high, but who counts them in the "swamps"? But these are deceptive estimates. After all, Ukraine is increasing its innovation potential, and the Russian Federation is losing its technological advantages - the Russians have lost the sea to us,...

The Russian Federation is slowly but advancing. Their losses are record high, but who counts them in the "swamps"? But these are deceptive estimates. After all, Ukraine is increasing its innovation potential, and the Russian Federation is losing its technological advantages - the Russians have lost the sea to us,...
description_uk: 1️⃣2️⃣ «Мы наращиваем потенциал для контрнаступления», - Виктор Кордон, начальник Отдела РЭБ 7 Корпуса ДШВ Сейчас многим кажется, что фронт встал и выхода нет. РФ медленно, но продвигается. Потери у них рекордные, но кто на «болотах» их считает? Но это обманчивые оценки. Ведь Украина наращивает свой потенциал инноваций, а РФ свои технологические преимущества теряет – россияне проиграли нам море,...

title: 15 missiles
title_en: 15 missiles
description: "You scared the Zetnik": Swedish mobile launchers with RBS-15 anti-ship missiles have appeared in Ukraine's service, publicists groan. The RBS-15 missile carries a warhead weighing about 200 kg and is guided to the target by GPS + active radar homing. The RBS-15 Mk3 version has a range of 200 km, and the latest RBS-15 Mk4 Gungnir version has a range of more than 300 km with the possibility...
description_en: "You scared the Zetnik": Swedish mobile launchers with RBS-15 anti-ship missiles have appeared in Ukraine's service, publicists groan. The RBS-15 missile carries a warhead weighing about 200 kg and is guided to the target by GPS + active radar homing. The RBS-15 Mk3 version has a range of 200 km, and the latest RBS-15 Mk4 Gungnir version has a range of more than 300 km with the possibility...
description_uk: "Вы напугали зетника": на вооружении Украины появилась шведские мобильные пусковые установки с противокорабельными ракетами RBS-15, стонут роспаблики. Ракета RBS-15 несет боевую часть массой около 200 кг и наводится на цель по GPS + активной радиолокационной ГСН. В версии RBS-15 Mk3 дальность составляет 200 км, а в новейшей версии RBS-15 Mk4 Gungnir на расстояние уже более 300 км с возможностью...

According to an adviser to the Minister of Defense, the information that appeared in Forbes is the result of Zelenskyi's misinterpreted words: "On March 23, the President of Ukraine announced that Belarus had 4 long-range "Shahed" control points, but we destroyed these antennas...
description_en: I don't know anything about the construction of airfields for the launch of "shakhedov" from Belarus, - Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov. According to an adviser to the Minister of Defense, the information that appeared in Forbes is the result of Zelenskyi's misinterpreted words: "On March 23, the President of Ukraine announced that Belarus had 4 long-range "Shahed" control points, but we destroyed these antennas...
description_uk: Мне ничего не известно о строительстве аэродромов для запуска "шахедов" из Беларуси, - Сергей "Флэш" Бескрестнов. По словам советника министра обороны, информация, появившаяся в Forbes, является результатом неправильно интерпретированных слов Зеленского: "23 марта Президент Украины заявляет, что в Беларуси было 4 пункта управления «шахедами» на дальние расстояния, но мы уничтожили эти антенны....

title: Drone incoming
title_en: Drone incoming
description: A new threat from the north: the Russian Federation is building at least four bases for long-range drones in Belarus, - Forbes This will significantly reduce the flight time to Ukrainian cities, the publication reports. Currently, UAVs are mostly launched from the territory of the Russian Federation, which gives time for preparation. However, Minsk is located only 440 kilometers from the Ukrainian capital, which threatens the western...
description_en: A new threat from the north: the Russian Federation is building at least four bases for long-range drones in Belarus, - Forbes This will significantly reduce the flight time to Ukrainian cities, the publication reports. Currently, UAVs are mostly launched from the territory of the Russian Federation, which gives time for preparation. However, Minsk is located only 440 kilometers from the Ukrainian capital, which threatens the western...
description_uk: Новая угроза с севера: рф строит в беларуси минимум четыре базы для дронов дальнего радиуса действия, - Forbes Это позволит значительно сократить время подлета к украинским городам, сообщает издание. В настоящее время БПЛА в основном запускаются с территории РФ, что дает время на подготовку. Однако Минск расположен всего в 440 километрах от украинской столицы, что ставит под угрозу западные...

title: Casualties reported
title_en: Casualties reported
description: 💬 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "This is what Russia is doing to our children. It's terrible. At least four people, including a child, died in Odesa last night. About a dozen more people were injured. The pressure on Moscow should increase, not decrease. Russian child killers should only face sanctions, isolation and accountability."
description_en: 💬 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "This is what Russia is doing to our children. It's terrible. At least four people, including a child, died in Odesa last night. About a dozen more people were injured. The pressure on Moscow should increase, not decrease. Russian child killers should only face sanctions, isolation and accountability."
description_uk: 💬 Міністр Андрій Сибіга: "Це те, що Росія робить із нашими дітьми. Жахливо. Щонайменше чотири людини, серед них дитина, загинули в Одесі цієї ночі. Ще близько десятка людей отримали поранення. Тиск на Москву має посилюватися, а не зменшуватися. Російські вбивці дітей повинні стикатися лише із санкціями, ізоляцією та відповідальністю".

title: Kyiv: Attack attack on infrastructure
title_en: Kyiv: Attack attack on infrastructure
description: Update: Serbia denies plans to frame Ukraine for gas pipeline sabotage plot. Earlier, Hungary’s Foreign Minister Peter Szijjarto hinted the plot “fits into the pattern” of Ukrainian attacks on Russian energy infrastructure. Kyiv has denied any involvement, suggesting the incident may be a Russian false-flag operation.
description_en: Update: Serbia denies plans to frame Ukraine for gas pipeline sabotage plot. Earlier, Hungary’s Foreign Minister Peter Szijjarto hinted the plot “fits into the pattern” of Ukrainian attacks on Russian energy infrastructure. Kyiv has denied any involvement, suggesting the incident may be a Russian false-flag operation.

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
title_en: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Ukrainian drones reportedly strike major oil terminal in Russian city of Novorossiysk. Explosions were reported overnight on April 6 in the southern Russian port city of Novorossiysk, with local residents reporting a drone attack at an oil terminal and damage to a residential building.
description_en: Ukrainian drones reportedly strike major oil terminal in Russian city of Novorossiysk. Explosions were reported overnight on April 6 in the southern Russian port city of Novorossiysk, with local residents reporting a drone attack at an oil terminal and damage to a residential building.
description_uk: Ukrainian drones reportedly strike major oil terminal in Russian city of Novorossiysk. Explosions were reported overnight on April 6 in the southern Russian port city of Novorossiysk, with local residents reporting a drone attack at an oil terminal and damage to a residential building.

title: Explosions reported
title_en: Explosions reported
description: The spokesman of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Georgy Tykhy: 💬 "We categorically reject attempts to unreasonably link Ukraine with the incident involving explosives found near the Turkish Stream gas pipeline in Serbia. Ukraine has nothing to do with this. Most likely, this is a Russian operation under a foreign flag as part of Moscow's active interference in the elections in Hungary."
description_en: The spokesman of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Georgy Tykhy: 💬 "We categorically reject attempts to unreasonably link Ukraine with the incident involving explosives found near the Turkish Stream gas pipeline in Serbia. Ukraine has nothing to do with this. Most likely, this is a Russian operation under a foreign flag as part of Moscow's active interference in the elections in Hungary."
description_uk: Речник МЗС Георгій Тихий: 💬 "Ми категорично відкидаємо спроби безпідставно пов’язати Україну з інцидентом із вибухівкою, знайденою поблизу газопроводу «Турецький потік» у Сербії. Україна не має до цього жодного відношення. Найімовірніше, це російська операція під чужим прапором у межах активного втручання Москви у вибори в Угорщині".

title: I sincerely congratulate everyone who celebrates Easter today in...
title_en: I sincerely congratulate everyone who celebrates Easter today in...
title_uk: Щиро вітаю всіх, хто сьогодні святкує Великдень у...
description: I sincerely congratulate everyone who celebrates Easter today in Ukraine and the world. In very difficult times for our people and all humanity, hope becomes stronger than ever - for the victory of life over death, good over evil, truth over lies. Everything that symbolizes the Resurrection of the Lord. May the strength of each of our people, their spirit, all the best that is in people - may all this definitely overcome the evil and darkness,...
description_en: I sincerely congratulate everyone who celebrates Easter today in Ukraine and the world. In very difficult times for our people and all humanity, hope becomes stronger than ever - for the victory of life over death, good over evil, truth over lies. Everything that symbolizes the Resurrection of the Lord. May the strength of each of our people, their spirit, all the best that is in people - may all this definitely overcome the evil and darkness,...
description_uk: Щиро вітаю всіх, хто в Україні та світі відзначає Великдень сьогодні. У дуже непрості часи для нашого народу й усього людства як ніколи сильною стає надія – на перемогу життя над смертю, добра над злом, правди над брехнею. Усього того, що символізує Воскресіння Господнє. Нехай сила кожної нашої людини, її духу, усього найкращого, що є в людях, – нехай усе це неодмінно здолає лихо й темряву,...
